name: @pdfbolt/node
description: Official Node.js SDK for the PDFBolt API.

scripts.check:node: node -e "const major = Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (major < 22) { console.error('Node.js 22 or newer is required.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs && node scripts/write-cjs-package.js
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test test/*.test.js test/*.test.cjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node --test test/integration.test.js && node --test test/integration-sync-template.test.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check:node && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:pack

author: PDFBolt
